找到ESF-1表格数据：
- June 30, 2022 (6月底): Total assets = 218,901,423 (千美元)
- September 30, 2022 (9月底): Total assets = 208,360,809 (千美元)

计算QoQ百分比变化:
变化 = (208,360,809 - 218,901,423) / 218,901,423 * 100
变化 = -10,540,614 / 218,901,423 * 100
变化 = -4.817% (约)

绝对变化 = |变化| = 4.817%

让我精确计算并四舍五入到千分位( thousandth = 0.001 = 小数点后3位)
</think>

<summary>
提取到ESF资产数据，计算QoQ百分比变化</summary>



```python
# 从表格提取的数据 (单位：千美元)
june_2022 = 218901423  # June 30, 2022 Total assets
sept_2022 = 208360809  # September 30, 2022 Total assets

# 计算变化量
change = sept_2022 - june_2022
print(f"Change: {change:,}")

# 计算百分比变化
pct_change = (change / june_2022) * 100
print(f"QoQ Percent Change: {pct_change:.6f}%")

# 绝对值百分比变化
abs_pct_change = abs(pct_change)
print(f"Absolute QoQ Percent Change: {abs_pct_change:.6f}%")

# 四舍五入到千分位 (小数点后3位)
rounded = round(abs_pct_change, 3)
print(f"Rounded to nearest thousandth: {rounded}")
